title: Alpha
review: A more real-world type of body horror from Julia Ducournau, that isn't as fun as {Raw} or as vivid as {Titane}, but tackles a more important subject. It's not so much of a horror movie, but there is a lot of social and medical anxiety for a drama. The plot hit all the right emotional beats for me, even if it was a little messy. I hope she goes full sicko for her next film. I want {Titane} times ten!
